description:
Membership. This schema is used to establish membership of person/entity to a club, an entity in a larger consortium, or even can be citizenship of a country. Think of this as 'Affiliation'

Provenance: vendored snapshot from LF-Decentralized-Trust-labs/decentralized-directory-protocol (non-normative copy) as of 2026-03-03.

publicKey.description: this can be a url/uri pointing to DeDi public key registry entry, or even DID

evidence.description: Evidence of membership (if any). Can be URL also
